g.title: MED_QSP
g.text: Ménière's Disease (메니에르병) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
Endolymphatic Sac Dysfunction → Endolymphatic Hydrops → Hair-Cell Injury → Episodic Vertigo, Fluctuating SNHL, Tinnitus, Aural Fullness
Betahistine · Diuretics (HCTZ/Triamterene, Acetazolamide) · Intratympanic Dexamethasone · Intratympanic Gentamicin · Vestibular Suppressants · Endolymphatic Sac/Neurectomy/Labyrinthectomy
